title: GAME ON
author: Navessa Allen
description: The third book of the Into Darkness series. Tyler seeks revenge against his father and pretends to be Stella’s boyfriend.

title: PROJECT HAIL MARY
author: Andy Weir
description: Ryland Grace awakes from a long sleep alone and far from home, and the fate of humanity rests on his shoulders; the basis of the movie.

title: THEO OF GOLDEN
author: Allen Levi
description: A man travels to a small Southern town, where he purchases pencil drawings of local residents and exchanges them for stories.

title: THE KEEPER
author: Tana French
description: The third book in the Cal Hooper series. Old feuds are reignited when a girl who was to be betrothed is found dead in a remote Irish village.

title: STARSIDE
author: Alex Aster
description: Aris traverses a realm of magic and immortals, where she faces dangers as she seeks to avenge her family’s death.

title: STRANGERS
author: Belle Burden
description: Burden retraces her marriage of 20 years in search of clues to help shape her understanding about its demise and to find a way forward.

title: PHASES
author: Brandy with Gerrick Kennedy
description: The actress and Grammy Award-winning musician shares some of her early struggles and her rise to fame.

title: STRIPPED DOWN
author: Bunnie Xo
description: The host of the “Dumb Blonde Podcast” shares how redemption was an important part of her journey toward reaching her goals.

title: A WORLD APPEARS
author: Michael Pollan
description: The author of “This Is Your Mind on Plants” explores several perspectives on consciousness.

title: THE BODY KEEPS THE SCORE
author: Bessel van der Kolk
description: How trauma affects the body and mind, and innovative treatments for recovery.

title: KPOP DEMON HUNTERS
author: Jessica Yoon
description: Huntrix takes on the Saja Boys, a boy band who happen to be demons in disguise. Based on the movie. (Ages 7 to 10)

title: THE COMPLETE COOKBOOK FOR YOUNG CHEFS
author: America's Test Kitchen Kids
description: Over 100 kid-tested recipes from America's Test Kitchen. (Ages 8 and up)

title: UNSETTLING SALAD!
author: Aaron Reynolds. Illustrated Peter Brown
description: Thadeus and Oliver take a bite out of a salad that may bite back! (Ages 6 to 9)

title: THE COURT OF THE DEAD
author: Rick Riordan and Mark Oshiro
description: Nico, Will and Hazel delve into the mysterious disappearances of monsters at Camp Jupiter. (Ages 10 to 14)

title: POCKET BEAR
author: Katherine Applegate. Illustrated Charles Santoso
description: Zephyrina brings a rare stuffed bear back to the Second Chances Home for the Tossed and Treasured. (Ages 8 to 12)

title: HOW TO CATCH THE EASTER BUNNY
author: Adam Wallace and Andy Elkerton
description: The Easter Bunny avoids traps in order to deliver eggs and candy. (Ages 4 to 8)

title: BEST BUNNY BROTHER EVER
author: Marilyn Sadler. Illustrated Tim Bowers
description: P.J. teaches Honey Bunny how to play “T-ball.” (Ages 3 to 7)

title: IT'S MY BIRD-DAY!
author: Mo Willems
description: The pigeon celebrates his birthday, but he’s not the only one. (Ages 3 to 5)

title: THE GOOD EGG PRESENTS: THE GREAT EGGSCAPE!
author: Jory John. Illustrated Pete Oswald
description: Good Egg and his pals escape their carton! (Ages 4 to 8)

title: FOR THE FANS!
author: Angela Song
description: Meet the members of the K-pop group Huntrix. (Ages 2 to 5)

title: DIARY OF A WIMPY KID
author: Jeff Kinney. Illustrated Jeff Kinney
description: The travails and challenges of adolescence. (Ages 9 to 12)

title: THE HUNGER GAMES
author: Suzanne Collins
description: In a dystopia, a girl fights for survival on live TV. (Ages 12 and up)

title: WINGS OF FIRE
author: Tui T. Sutherland
description: Only the five dragonets of destiny can unite the seven warring dragon tribes. (Ages 9 to 12)

title: HARRY POTTER
author: J.K. Rowling
description: A wizard hones his conjuring skills in the service of fighting evil. (Ages 10 and up)

title: THE WILD ROBOT
author: Peter Brown
description: Roz the robot adapts to her surroundings on a remote, wild island. (Ages 7 to 12)

title: FAKE SKATING
author: Lynn Painter
description: After years of separation, the childhood friends Alec and Dani reunite and face their true feelings toward each other. (Ages 14 and up)

title: THE SUN AND THE STARMAKER
author: Rachel Griffin
description: The Starmaker senses a powerful magic within Aurora Finch and requests that she come study under his tutelage. (Ages 14 to 18)

title: IF ONLY I HAD TOLD HER
author: Laura Nowlin
description: In this companion to “If He Had Been With Me,” the story of Finn and Autumn is told through three different perspectives. (Ages 14 to 18)

title: DIVINE RIVALS
author: Rebecca Ross
description: Two young rival journalists find love through a magical connection. (Ages 13 to 18)

title: A STAGE SET FOR VILLAINS
author: Shannon J. Spann
description: Riven Hesper makes a deal with a “Player,” an immortal being, to save her own life. (Ages 16 and up)

title: THE LET THEM THEORY
author: Mel Robbins
description: Read by the author. 10 hours, 38 minutes unabridged.

title: ATOMIC HABITS
author: James Clear
description: Read by the author. 5 hours, 35 minutes unabridged.

title: THE 48 LAWS OF POWER
author: Robert Greene
description: Read by Richard Poe. 23 hours, 6 minutes unabridged.

title: THE KING IS COMING
author: John Bevere
description: Read by the author. 9 hours, 45 minutes unabridged.

title: NEVER SPLIT THE DIFFERENCE
author: Chris Voss with Tahl Raz
description: Read by Michael Kramer. 8 hours, 7 minutes unabridged.
